title: Resounding Luminescence
description: Improves Minecraft's Audio. Made for both "Better Than Adventure!" and Modern Minecraft.
body:
This is a Texture/Resource Pack, designed for both "[Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/)", and Modern Minecraft (1.21 and above), that improves the game's audio.

**NOTICE: If the game or Modrinth tells you the pack is outdated, in most cases it won't matter; it will still work regardless.**

# SHOWCASE VIDEO (Version BTA-1.1)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fm9-rX6oP1c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




<details>
<summary>DETAILS OF THE BTA VERSION</summary>

  # FEATURES
- New custom Cave Noises + Minecraft's Cave Noises from 14 to 19.
- Replaced Rain sounds with improved ones, and added new custom Thunder sounds.
- Made the Explode sound a mix between the old and modern one.
- More Click sounds, directly from Minecraft's Click original source!
- (If it'll ever get used) Fused the modern and old Lava sounds into 2 sounds
- The old Splash sound is now in source quality; no longer muffled and extremely low quality!
- Modern Bow sounds, but improved (Dispenser/Droppers will still play old one).
- Fused the old and modern Arrow Hit sounds into one.
- Improved, custom Eat sounds.
- New custom Flint and Steel / Fire Striker sounds.
- Cows will now play their modern sounds, alongside the current, old ones (Modern Hurt sounds have been pitched up to fit the old ones, also, the Old Hurt sounds have a doubled change of playing)!
- Creepers will now play their ancient Hit sounds, alongside the current ones!
- Ghasts are now terrifying.
- Player Hurt sound no longer has that horrible trailing ending.
- Skeletons will now play their modern sounds alongside the current, old ones!
- Spiders and Zombies have improved sounds.
- New Music, alongside the ones already in the game (Vanilla Music have a doubled chance of playing; so they won't be buried by the new ones)!
- Quieter Fizz and Wolf Howl sounds.
- Music Discs volume adjustments.
- (If it'll ever get implemented) 11 will either play the in-game version or the Spotify version (random selection).
- Cat will either play the in-game version or the Spotify version (random selection).
- Chirp & Dog have been replaced with their Spotify version.
- Wolves have a chance of howling instead of whining (Whine sound has a doubled change of playing).

# CREDITS

Music used:

The pack contains resources from the following projects:
- [Gentler Weather Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gentler-weather-sounds): 
    Extra Weather Sounds
- [Angel's Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/angels-weather): 
    Extra Weather Sounds
- Minecraft: Story Mode (+ edits by AndreWharn): 
    Ghast, Spider, Zombie, Iron Golem, Wither sounds

Extra:
- [AndreWharn](https://andrewharn.carrd.co): 
    Pack and some of the rest of the custom stuff
</details>




<details>
<summary>DETAILS OF THE MODERN VANILLA VERSION</summary>

Unlike the BTA version, this pack is way more massive and overhauls many more things.
This was the original version of Resounding Luminescence that I never finished, I just decided to finish it in the BTA port, but since there have been people that wanted this, I decided to finish this as well... kind of in rush and in a sleep-deprived state, so if there are any errors or things missing from the BTA version, please let me know.

# FEATURES
Vanilla:
- New custom Cave Noises.
- Replaced Rain sounds with improved ones, and added new custom Thunder sounds.
- More Click sounds, directly from Minecraft's Click original source!
- Fused the modern and old Lava sounds into 2 sounds.
- Splash sound is now the old one, but in source quality (no longer horribly muffled)!
- Improved Bow sounds.
- Fused the old and modern Arrow Hit sounds into one.
- New custom Flint and Steel sounds.
- Cows will now play their old sounds, alongside the current ones (Modern Hurt sounds have been pitched up to fit the old ones, also, the Old Hurt sounds have a doubled change of playing)!
- Ghasts and Withers are now terrifying.
- Player Hurt sounds now uses the old fleshy one as a base.
- Mobs, such as Spiders, Zombies, Blazes, Breezes, Creepers, Magma Cubes, Endermites, Iron Golems, and more, have improved sounds, and even new ones.
- There is a rare chance the scariest Mobs can play a Cave Noise instead of its ambient one.
- Made Fizz, Wolf Howl, Enderman Stare, and other loud sounds, quieter.
- Music Discs text and volume adjustments.
- Music Disc 11 will either play the in-game version or the Spotify version (random selection).
- Cat will either play the in-game version, the Spotify version, or Dog (random selection).
- Chirp has been replaced with its Spotify version.
- Wolves have a chance of howling instead of whining or growling (Whine and Growl sounds have higher chances of playing).
- All Game Music now plays regardless of the biome and dimension (excluded The Deep Dark). There are some tracks that will play more often in some, though.
- New Eat and Drink sounds, from Pokémon Mystery Dungeon.
- The Deep Dark now only plays Ancestry, as I believe it's THE track for this place, and the rest don't fit at all.
- There's additional new music, coming from lots of places (C418, Dungeons, Story Mode, Fanmade...)!
- Creative Mode now also play the normal game music, and has a chance to also play the Title Screen ones.
- Creative Mode music can be heard in Survival, but only in some biomes (ex. Aria Math in dry biomes). It's not by default as the tracks have quite a different style compared to the survival ones, and they don't fit to be played all the time (also, that would make Creative Mode lose one of its specialties).
- New Eating and Drinking sounds, from Pokémon Mystery Dungeon (why? Because I wanted to).
- Some Easter Eggs...
- Much, much other stuff that I cannot remember anymore. Discover it yourself! :D

Mods:
- Improvements to the [Console Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/consolesounds), [Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals), [Healing Pretty Good](https://modrinth.com/mod/healing-pretty-good) Mods' sounds.
- The Warden's Heartbeat sounds have been re-used; replaces the ones from the [Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) Mod.
- [Extra Sounds Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/jv7tzVE4)'s Poof Sounds replaced with Minecraft: Story Mode's Poof Sounds.
- [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects)' Stomach Growl sound has been replaced with the hunger sound from Pokémon Mystery Dungeon (why? Because I wanted to).
- [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)'s girl hurt sounds have been replaced with better ones (the same ones from my [The Feminine Joy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-feminine-joy) Resource Pack for BTA, making you able to have them in modern Minecraft, as long as you get the mod).


# CREDITS
The pack contains resources from the following projects:
- [Gentler Weather Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gentler-weather-sounds): 
    Extra Weather Sounds
- [Angel's Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/angels-weather): 
    Extra Weather Sounds
- [Minecraft: RE-Indev](https://reindev.miraheze.org/wiki/Reindev_Wiki): 
    Background, Harp, Night 1, Night 2, Night 3, Night 4, Sky 2 music tracks
- [ClassicCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-craft): 
    Nether's Aria Math track (base, finalized by AndreWharn)
- [Music and Melody](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-and-melody): 
    Some new music tracks inside its folder in "assets/minecraft/sounds/music/custom"
- [Contrasting sounds effects](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/contrasting-sounds-effect): 
    A "The End version" of the 11 Music Disc
- [Music Redefined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-redefined): 
    Some new music tracks inside its folder in "assets/minecraft/sounds/music/custom"
- [Music Pack Renewed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/musicpackrenewed): 
    Some new music tracks inside its folder in "assets/minecraft/sounds/music/custom"
- [Refreshed Melodies](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refreshed-melodies): 
    Some new music tracks inside its folder in "assets/minecraft/sounds/music/custom"
- Minecraft: Story Mode (+ edits by AndreWharn): 
    Ghast, Spider, Zombie, Iron Golem, Wither, Magma Cube, Creeper sounds


Extra:
- spoono: 
    Modern fleshy hurt sounds
- [Nihhiu](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJr6JE11U6PYJQpLPGtmQJQ): 
    Lena Raine - Infinite Amethyst (Remix), 
    C418 - Mice on Venus (Remix)
- [AndreWharn](https://andrewharn.carrd.co): 
    Pack and some of the rest of the custom stuff
- Precise/more music credits inside the "en_us.json" file in "assets/minecraft/lang", or by toggling on the Music Toast Setting inside the game
</details>




**All rights belong to the original creators; please be sure to support their work!
No copyright infringements are intended. If any credit is missing, or you want your stuff to be removed, contact me on Discord immediately.
Do not distribute this pack, or/and its assets, elsewhere without the authors' consent.**

# Thanks for using this pack! :D
